content: Intent: cancellation_request. Tone: concise. Pesanan [ORDER_ID] belum diproses, jadi saya bisa langsung batalkan. Pembatalan telah berhasil. Dana akan dikembalikan ke saldo OVO Anda dalam 24 jam. Apakah Anda ingin memesan ulang dengan ukuran yang benar sekarang?

Intent: cancellation_request. Tone: friendly. Tentu, saya akan segera memproses pembatalan Anda. Pesanan [ORDER_ID] belum masuk tahap pengemasan, sehingga pembatalan dapat dilakukan sekarang. Dana akan dikembalikan ke metode pembayaran asal dalam 1-3 hari kerja. Apakah Anda ingin segera memesan ulang dengan ukuran yang benar? Saya bisa bantu carikan stoknya.

Intent: cancellation_request. Tone: professional. Baik, saya faham. Untuk pesanan [ORDER_ID], ia belum dihantar lagi jadi pembatalan masih boleh dilakukan. Saya akan proses pembatalan sekarang dan bayaran akan dikembalikan dalam 3-5 hari bekerja. Anda akan menerima pengesahan melalui e-mel.

Intent: complaint_handling. Tone: apologetic. I deeply apologize for the poor experience you've had. Your frustration is completely valid. I'm taking personal ownership of your case now. Please provide your case number or order details, and I will escalate this to our senior team for immediate resolution within 24 hours.

Intent: complaint_handling. Tone: professional. Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and I apologize for the substandard packaging. We have strict packaging guidelines, and this incident is being reviewed with our logistics team to prevent recurrence. We appreciate your feedback as it helps us improve. For your next order, we will ensure reinforced packaging is used. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Intent: exchange_request. Tone: apologetic. 对于商品颜色不符的情况我们深表歉意。您可以在收货后7天内申请换货。请提供订单编号和收到的商品照片，我们将为您安排免费换货服务。
Intent: exchange_request. Tone: concise. 可以的。您可以申请换货，请提供您的订单号[ORDER_ID]和想要更换的颜色。我们会为您安排取件和发货，整个过程大约需要5-7个工作日。

Intent: exchange_request. Tone: friendly. Tentu bisa! Kami menyediakan penukaran dalam 15 hari. Untuk sepatu ukuran 42 yang Anda terima, silakan ajukan penukaran di menu 'Pesanan Saya' dan pilih opsi 'Tukar Ukuran'. Pastikan sepatu belum dipakai dan masih ada kotak aslinya. Setelah pengajuan diterima, kami akan segera mengirimkan ukuran 41 ke alamat Anda. Jika stok ukuran 41 habis, kami akan hubungi Anda untuk alternatif lain.

Intent: exchange_request. Tone: professional. Sudah tentu, kami boleh bantu dengan pertukaran saiz. Sila log masuk ke akaun anda, pergi ke 'Pesanan Saya', pilih item tersebut, dan klik 'Tukar'. Pilih saiz baharu yang dikehendaki. Jika stok saiz baharu masih ada, proses pertukaran akan diteruskan. Anda akan menerima label penghantaran prabayar untuk menghantar item asal kembali kepada kami.

Intent: exchange_request. Tone: sales_oriented. I'd be happy to help you with that exchange! Let me check the inventory for you... Good news, we do have the XL size in stock in the same red color. Would you like me to process the exchange now? I can also suggest some matching accessories that would look great with it!

Intent: order_status. Tone: apologetic. We apologize for the delay. I've checked your order [ORDER_ID] and it's currently held at the local sorting center due to high volume. It should be delivered by tomorrow. We're sorry for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience.

Intent: order_status. Tone: concise. Hello! Your order [ORDER_ID] has been dispatched and is currently in transit to the delivery hub. You can expect it within the next 2-3 business days. For real-time tracking, you may check the 'My Orders' section in your account.

Intent: order_status. Tone: friendly. Hi there! I'd be happy to check on that for you. Your order [ORDER_ID] was dispatched yesterday and is currently in transit with our logistics partner. You can expect delivery within the next 2-3 business days. Let me know if you need the tracking link!

Intent: order_status. Tone: professional. Hello! Thank you for reaching out. I've checked your order [ORDER_ID] with the courier and can confirm it was picked up from our warehouse yesterday. There may be a slight delay in tracking updates. You should see movement within the next 24 hours. We apologize for the inconvenience.

Intent: out_of_stock. Tone: apologetic. Mohon maaf, Sepatu Model X memang sangat diminati dan saat ini stok habis. Berdasarkan informasi dari penjual, stok baru diperkirakan tersedia dalam 2-3 minggu. Untuk mendapatkan notifikasi saat produk ini tersedia lagi, Anda bisa klik tombol 'Notify Me' di halaman produk. Kami juga memiliki model sepatu serupa dari penjual lain yang mungkin Anda sukai. Apakah Anda tertarik untuk melihat alternatifnya?

Intent: out_of_stock. Tone: concise. Maaf, produk tersebut kehabisan stok buat sementara waktu. Kami menjangkakan ia akan tersedia semula dalam 7-10 hari. Anda boleh klik 'Beritahu Saya' pada halaman produk untuk menerima pemberitahuan sebaik sahaja ia kembali dalam stok.

Intent: out_of_stock. Tone: friendly. Terima kasih atas pertanyaan. Baju kurung moden saiz L memang sangat popular. Kami jangka stok baru akan tersedia dalam masa 2-3 minggu. Anda boleh klik butang 'Maklumkan Saya' pada halaman produk untuk menerima e-mel pemberitahuan sebaik sahaja ia kembali dalam stok.

Intent: out_of_stock. Tone: professional. Terima kasih atas pertanyaan anda. Berdasarkan sistem kami, 'Instant Pot 6L' dijangka akan kembali stok dalam masa 2-3 minggu lagi. Anda boleh klik butang 'Beritahu Saya' pada halaman produk untuk mendapatkan pemberitahuan segera apabila ia tersedia semula. Adakah anda berminat dengan model lain yang serupa yang mungkin ada stok sekarang?

Intent: out_of_stock. Tone: sales_oriented. Kami sedang dalam proses untuk mendapatkan stok baru bagi beg tote kulit ini. Anda boleh klik 'Notify Me' di halaman produk untuk menerima pemberitahuan sebaik sahaja ia tersedia. Sementara itu, mungkin anda berminat dengan beg kami yang lain?

Intent: payment_issue. Tone: apologetic. Kami minta maaf atas kesulitan ini. Sistem kami menunjukkan bahawa transaksi anda tidak berjaya kerana kegagalan pengesahan bank. Wang anda tidak akan dipotong. Sila cuba semula dalam 30 minit atau gunakan kaedah pembayaran lain seperti e-dompet atau pemindahan bank. Jika masalah berterusan, sila hubungi bank anda untuk pengesahan kad.

Intent: payment_issue. Tone: concise. Jangan bimbang, ini mungkin disebabkan oleh kelewatan pengesahan pembayaran. Sila semak e-mel anda untuk resit pembayaran dan hubungi bank anda untuk pengesahan. Jika wang telah dipotong tetapi pesanan tidak diproses, sila hubungi kami dengan bukti transaksi untuk penyelesaian segera.

Intent: payment_issue. Tone: friendly. Halo! Terima kasih sudah menghubungi kami. Saya bisa bantu cek masalah pembayaran Anda. Beberapa kemungkinan penyebab kegagalan pembayaran kartu kredit: 1) Verifikasi 3D Secure belum selesai, 2) Ada batasan transaksi dari bank penerbit, 3) Sistem sedang maintenance. Coba langkah ini: refresh halaman, pastikan pop-up tidak diblokir, atau gunakan metode pembayaran alternatif seperti transfer bank atau COD. Jika masih bermasalah, saya bisa bantu hubungkan dengan tim payment kami.

Intent: payment_issue. Tone: professional. Terima kasih kerana memaklumkan kami. Kegagalan transaksi kad kredit mungkin disebabkan oleh beberapa faktor seperti limit kad, kesilapan memasukkan butiran, atau sistem bank yang sementara tidak tersedia. Sila pastikan butiran kad anda betul dan cuba sekali lagi. Jika masalah berterusan, anda boleh cuba menggunakan kaedah pembayaran lain seperti perbankan dalam talian atau e-dompet. Wang tidak akan dipotong untuk transaksi yang gagal.

Intent: product_defect. Tone: apologetic. I sincerely apologize for the defective product you received. This is certainly not the quality we aim to deliver. Please do not use the blender for safety reasons. We will arrange for a free return pickup and send you a brand-new replacement unit immediately. Could you please upload a photo of the cracked lid through the app's support section for our records?

Intent: product_defect. Tone: concise. I'm sorry to hear that. For a defective item, you can request a return or replacement through the 'My Orders' section within 7 days of receipt. Please select 'Product Defect' as the reason. We'll arrange a free pickup.

Intent: product_defect. Tone: friendly. Halo! Kami mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan ini. Untuk barang yang cacat, silakan ajukan permintaan pengembalian melalui halaman 'Pesanan Saya' dengan mengunggah foto kerusakan. Tim kami akan segera memproses penggantian barang baru atau pengembalian dana sesuai preferensi Anda.

Intent: product_defect. Tone: professional. I'm sorry to hear about the dead pixel on your new laptop. This is covered under our defect policy. You have two options: 1) We can arrange a replacement unit to be sent to you immediately, or 2) We can process a full refund if you prefer. Please let me know which option you'd like to proceed with, and we'll guide you through the next steps.

Intent: product_defect. Tone: sales_oriented. I'm sorry about the defective blender jar. We can offer a full replacement or store credit with an extra 10% discount on your next purchase. Which option would you prefer?

Intent: product_inquiry. Tone: concise. Tidak, laptop TechPro X1 yang kami jual belum termasuk Microsoft Office pra-instal. Namun, laptop ini sudah dilengkapi dengan sistem operasi Windows asli. Anda bisa membeli lisensi Microsoft Office secara terpisah atau menggunakan alternatif gratis seperti LibreOffice.

Intent: product_inquiry. Tone: friendly. Hello! Thank you for your interest in our wireless earbuds. Yes, these earbuds do feature active noise cancellation. The battery life is approximately 6 hours with ANC on, and the charging case provides an additional 18 hours. Would you like to know about any other features or availability?

Intent: product_inquiry. Tone: professional. Hello! The wireless earbuds with ANC include three sizes of silicone ear tips (S, M, L) for a comfortable fit. The charging case provides an additional 24 hours of battery life on top of the earbuds' own 8 hours. Is there anything else you'd like to know about this product?

Intent: product_inquiry. Tone: sales_oriented. Absolutely! We have the 'TrailMaster Pro' backpack which is highly waterproof with IPX4 rating and has over 500 positive reviews for durability and comfort. It's currently on a 15% promotion. Would you like me to check availability in your region and provide detailed features?

Intent: refund_request. Tone: apologetic. Kami mohon maaf atas kelewatan ini. Biasanya proses refund mengambil 3-5 hari bekerja selepas item diterima oleh gudang kami. Saya akan segera escalate kes anda dengan pasukan kewangan dan maklumkan anda sebaik sahaja refund diproses. Terima kasih atas kesabaran anda.

Intent: refund_request. Tone: concise. Baik, saya faham anda ingin membuat permohonan refund untuk pesanan [ORDER_ID]. Untuk memproses refund, sila sediakan gambar barang yang diterima dan nyatakan perbezaan dengan penerangan asal. Saya akan bantu anda dengan proses ini. Refund penuh akan diproses dalam tempoh 3-5 hari bekerja selepas kelulusan.

Intent: refund_request. Tone: friendly. Tentu, saya bantu proses refund untuk pesanan [ORDER_ID]. Pertama, silakan unggah foto barang yang diterima beserta kemasan asli di halaman 'Pengembalian Dana'. Tim kami akan verifikasi dalam 1-2 hari kerja. Setelah disetujui, dana akan dikembalikan ke metode pembayaran asal Anda dalam 3-7 hari kerja.

Intent: refund_request. Tone: professional. Terima kasih telah menghubungi kami. Kami akan segera memproses permintaan pengembalian dana Anda. Mohon untuk mengisi formulir pengembalian melalui halaman 'Pesanan Saya' dengan menyertakan foto produk yang tidak sesuai. Setelah diverifikasi, dana akan dikembalikan ke metode pembayaran asli Anda dalam 3-7 hari kerja. Apakah ada informasi lain yang Anda butuhkan?

Intent: refund_request. Tone: sales_oriented. I understand you'd like a refund. Before proceeding, I see you're interested in the 'Premium Blender' category. Many customers who purchased that item also loved our top-rated 'ProMix Blender' with a longer warranty and extra attachments. Would you like me to switch your order to that model instead? We can offer a 10% discount for the change. If not, I'll initiate the full refund process immediately.

Intent: return_policy. Tone: concise. Electronics have a 7-day return window from delivery if unopened and in original packaging. For defective items, we offer a 30-day return or exchange. Would you like to start a return?

Intent: return_policy. Tone: friendly. Hello! For electronics, our return policy allows returns within 14 days of delivery if the item is unused and in its original packaging. Since you've opened it, we'd need to inspect it first, but you can still initiate a return request through your account.

Intent: return_policy. Tone: professional. Our return policy for electronics allows returns within 7 days of receipt if the item is defective or not as described. For your case, please initiate a return request from your order history. We will arrange a pickup and provide a full refund or replacement once we receive the item back.

Intent: shipping_delay. Tone: apologetic. I sincerely apologize for the delay with your order [ORDER_ID]. I've checked with our logistics partner and there's been a slight backlog at the sorting center. Your package is now en route and is expected to arrive within the next 48 hours. I'll send you a notification once it's out for delivery.

Intent: shipping_delay. Tone: concise. We apologize for the delay with shipment [TRACKING_ID]. It's currently held at a sorting facility due to high volume. Expected delivery is now within 3 business days. We've flagged it for priority handling. You'll receive an update once it moves.

Intent: shipping_delay. Tone: friendly. Hi there! Thanks for checking in. I've looked into your shipment, and there seems to be a slight delay at the sorting facility. Rest assured, your package is in transit and the tracking should update within the next 24-48 hours. We're keeping a close eye on it and will notify you of any changes.

Intent: shipping_delay. Tone: professional. I apologize for the delay with your order [ORDER_ID]. I've checked with our logistics partner, and there was an unexpected operational delay at the regional sorting center. Your package is now back in transit, and the tracking should update within the next 12-24 hours. The revised estimated delivery date is within 3 business days. We appreciate your patience and will monitor it closely.

Intent: shipping_delay. Tone: sales_oriented. Mohon maaf atas keterlambatan pengiriman. Saya sudah cek dan paket Anda sedang dalam perjalanan terakhir. Sebagai bentuk permohonan maaf, saya ingin menawarkan voucher diskon 10% untuk pembelian berikutnya. Apakah Anda tertarik?

Intent: size_recommendation. Tone: friendly. Berdasarkan ukuran anda (170cm, 65kg), saiz M (Medium) atau L (Large) biasanya sesuai untuk seluar jeans kami. Saiz M mungkin lebih ketat di bahagian paha, manakala L lebih selesa. Untuk ketepatan, saya sarankan anda menyemak carta saiz kami di halaman produk dan mengukur pinggang serta pinggul anda. Jika anda memilih antara dua saiz, ambil yang lebih besar untuk keselesaan. Adakah anda perlukan bantuan lanjut?

Intent: size_recommendation. Tone: professional. Berdasarkan tinggi dan berat badan Anda, ukuran M atau L pada celana ini bisa jadi pilihan yang baik, tergantung pada gaya yang Anda inginkan. Ukuran M akan pas di badan, sementara L akan memberikan kesan lebih santai. Silakan lihat tabel ukuran detail di halaman produk untuk lingkar pinggang dan paha. Untuk akurasi terbaik, Anda bisa mengukur celana yang paling nyaman Anda pakai saat ini dan bandingkan dengan tabel ukuran kami.

Intent: size_recommendation. Tone: sales_oriented. Berdasarkan ukuran anda, saiz 32 (M) biasanya sesuai untuk seluar jeans kami. Namun, untuk kesesuaian terbaik, saya cadangkan anda menyemak panduan saiz di halaman produk untuk ukuran pinggul dan pinggang. Kami juga mempunyai gaya slim fit dan regular fit yang boleh anda pilih!

Intent: voucher_issue. Tone: apologetic. Mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan ini. Ada beberapa kemungkinan mengapa voucher tidak terpakai: mungkin voucher sudah kedaluwarsa, tidak berlaku untuk kategori produk tertentu, atau sudah mencapai batas penggunaan. Bisa tolong berikan kode [VOUCHER_CODE] dan nomor [ORDER_ID] agar saya bisa investigasi lebih lanjut?

Intent: voucher_issue. Tone: concise. Maaf atas kesulitan. Kod [VOUCHER_CODE] mungkin telah tamat tempoh atau tidak layak untuk item dalam troli anda. Sila semak syarat dan tempoh sah. Jika masih ada masalah, boleh beritahu saya item dalam pesanan anda?

Intent: voucher_issue. Tone: friendly. Hai! Terima kasih kerana menghubungi kami. Saya sudah semak voucher [VOUCHER_CODE] dan mendapati ia telah tamat tempoh pada 15hb lepas. Voucher ini sah untuk tempoh 30 hari sahaja. Anda boleh lihat semua voucher aktif anda di bahagian 'Dompet Saya'. Jika ada masalah lain, saya sedia membantu!

Intent: voucher_issue. Tone: professional. Maaf atas kesulitan. Sila pastikan kod baucar dimasukkan dengan betul tanpa ruang. Jika masih gagal, ia mungkin telah tamat tempoh atau digunakan. Anda boleh semak syarat penggunaan di akaun anda.

Intent: voucher_issue. Tone: sales_oriented. I've checked the terms for voucher [VOUCHER_CODE]. While it offers free shipping, it does have a minimum spend requirement of $30 to qualify. Your current order total is $25. Would you like to add a small item to your cart to reach the threshold? We have a great selection of accessories under $5 that would complete your order and save you on shipping. Alternatively, you can save the voucher for your next larger purchase.

Intent: warranty_question. Tone: concise. The smart TV comes with a 2-year warranty covering manufacturing defects and hardware malfunctions. It does not cover physical damage or software issues caused by third-party apps. Claims require the original invoice. Would you like the full terms and conditions?

Intent: warranty_question. Tone: friendly. Yes, all electronics on our platform include a 1-year manufacturer warranty. To claim, simply contact us with your order ID and a description of the issue. We'll guide you through the warranty service process, which may involve repair or replacement.

Intent: warranty_question. Tone: professional. Yes, our blenders come with a 1-year manufacturer's warranty from the date of purchase. To claim warranty service, please provide your order number [ORDER_ID] and a description or video of the malfunction. Our team will guide you through the repair or replacement process. Do you have your purchase receipt handy?
Intent: wrong_item_received. Tone: apologetic. 非常抱歉给您带来了这么大的困扰！这确实是我们的失误。请您不要担心，我们会立即为您处理。请提供您的订单号 [ORDER_ID]，我们会为您重新发送正确的商品，并安排上门取回错误的商品。同时，我们会为您补偿一张优惠券以表歉意。
Intent: wrong_item_received. Tone: concise. 非常抱歉给您发错了颜色。我们将立即为您安排正确的商品。请您提供订单编号[ORDER_ID]，我们将安排免费取回错误的商品并寄出您原本订购的蓝色T恤。处理时间约为5-7个工作日。再次为我们的失误表示歉意。
Intent: wrong_item_received. Tone: friendly. 非常抱歉给您带来了不便。请您提供订单号 [ORDER_ID] 和收到错误商品的照片，我们会立即为您安排换货或退款。同时，建议您保留商品原包装，以便快递员上门取件。

Intent: wrong_item_received. Tone: professional. I apologize for the mix-up. For [ORDER_ID], we've sent the wrong item. Please file a return request for the incorrect item, and we will ship the correct red dress to you immediately. The return shipping is on us.

Intent: wrong_item_received. Tone: sales_oriented. Oh no, that's definitely not right! We apologize for the fulfillment error. Let's get this sorted quickly. I'll arrange an immediate return pickup for the socks, and we'll expedite shipping on the correct headphones. Would you also like a [VOUCHER_CODE] for your next purchase as a thank you for your patience?
